title: pavonia rehmannii
intro: Pavonia rehmannii, also known as Chinese rose or rock rose, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It is a perennial herb native to China, used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pavonia rehmannii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
